author: Landy
description: Adds reading-view text-to-speech controls for content tagged in Markdown source. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.name: Speak Out

name: Speak Out

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ## Speak Out 1.0.3 This release adds language-aware text-to-speech controls and improves the voice picker. ### Added - Added a **Default language** setting for system-default voice playback. - Added support for HTML `lang` attributes on speakable content, such as `Bonjour tout le monde.`. - Added language support to Markdown link markers, such as `[Bonjour tout le monde.](speak:fr-FR)`. ### Improved - Grouped voice options by language in settings. - Improved voice labels so they are easier to scan. - Updated README documentation for language-specific playback. ### Fixed - Fixed Speak Out icon rendering on iPad.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Speak Out 1.0.2
This release improves the settings experience and tightens visual compatibility for speakable content highlights.

### Changes
- Refactored the settings tab into structured, reusable setting definitions.
- Improved settings refresh behavior when changing speech engines, voices, or marker options.
- Preserved validation that at least one marker type remains enabled.
- Updated speakable content highlighting to use color-mix() only when supported, with a reliable Obsidian theme fallback.
- Removed `box-decoration-break` styling from speakable content highlights.
- Updated the minimum supported Obsidian version to 1.3.5.
- Bumped plugin/package version from 1.0.1 to 1.0.2.

### Compatibility
Requires Obsidian `1.3.5` or newer.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
First version for the speak-out plugin.
Add markers in your markdown and click to listen to the wrapped content in the reading view.
